instructions: Step 1: Open the bet/menu panel (Menu button bottom-left) and locate the bet level selector.
Step 2: Select the bet level value '25' (the lowest level per spec.bet_mechanics.bet_levels[0]=25).
Step 3: Set the coin value to 0.01 USD.
Step 4: Verify the panel shows bet level=25 and the bet display reads '0.25' (= 0.01 × 25).
